text: Either party may terminate this Agreement by providing 30 days written notice to the other party.
explanation: Balanced notice period protecting both employer and employee.

text: The probation period shall not exceed six months unless extended by mutual written agreement.
Any modification to the employee’s compensation structure shall require prior written notice.
explanation: Protects employees from arbitrary salary changes.

text: The Receiving Party shall use Confidential Information solely for the purpose described in this Agreement.
Confidentiality obligations shall survive termination of this Agreement for a period of three years.
Invoices shall be paid within 15 business days from the date of receipt.
Any changes to the scope of work shall require written approval from both parties.
Ownership of deliverables shall transfer to the Client only after full payment is received.
The Service Provider shall use commercially reasonable efforts to maintain 99.5% monthly uptime.
Customer data shall be processed in compliance with applicable privacy and data protection laws.
The total liability of either party shall not exceed the fees paid under this Agreement during the preceding twelve months.
The security deposit shall be refunded within 30 days after the tenant vacates the premises, subject to lawful deductions.
Either party may terminate the tenancy by providing 30 days written notice.
The Landlord shall maintain the premises in a habitable condition during the tenancy.
Profits and losses shall be distributed among partners according to their agreed ownership percentages.
Disputes between partners shall first be resolved through mediation before litigation.
The Client shall pay undisputed invoices within 30 days of receipt.
Each party shall indemnify the other against third-party claims arising from its own negligence or misconduct.
Personal data shall only be collected for lawful and clearly disclosed business purposes.
Users may request access, correction, or deletion of their personal data subject to applicable law.
The Licensor grants a non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the Software for internal business purposes.
The Licensee shall not reverse engineer or redistribute the Software except as permitted by law.
Any disputes arising under these Terms shall be resolved through binding arbitration in accordance with applicable law.
Users shall be notified of material changes to these Terms before such changes take effect.
